---
name: Port mismatch
about: A harbor on the generated board does not match your physical frame

**Which frame?** 4-player / 5–6 player

**Which port is wrong?** (e.g. "top-center", or describe its position clockwise from the left edge)

**What the app shows:** (3:1, or a 2:1 resource)

**What your frame shows:**

**Edition / printing of your set, if known:**

**A photo of the frame helps a lot** — drag it in here.
